title: PAN-OS - Block IP - Custom Block Rule
content:
This playbook blocks IP addresses using Custom Block Rules in Palo Alto Networks Panorama or Firewall.
The playbook receives malicious IP addresses as inputs, creates a custom bi-directional rule to block them, and commits the configuration.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PAN-OS, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — LogForwarding: Panorama log forwarding object name; IP: IP address to block; AutoCommit: This input establishes whether to commit the configuration automatically.
Yes - Commit automatically.
No - Commit manually..

Integrations/scripts used: pan-os-create-address, pan-os-custom-block-rule.

inputs:
- key: LogForwarding
  value: {}
  required: false
  description: Panorama log forwarding object name
- key: IP
  value:
    complex:
      root: IP
      filters:

          left:
            value:
              simple: IP.Malicious
            iscontext: true
      accessor: Address
      transformers:
      - operator: uniq
  required: false
  description: IP address to block
- key: AutoCommit
  value:
    simple: "No"
  required: false
  description: |-
    This input establishes whether to commit the configuration automatically.
    Yes - Commit automatically.
    No - Commit manually.
